name: The Brady Bunch
description: The iconic 1970s blended-family sitcom — 'Here's the story, of a lovely lady…'

questions.q: How many children are there in the Brady family?

source.notes: Three boys and three girls.

questions.q: What is Mike Brady's profession?

source.notes: Much-mocked 'plans' and drafting scenes.

questions.q: On which U.S. network did The Brady Bunch originally air?

source.notes: 1969-1974, Friday nights.

questions.q: What is the name of the Bradys' live-in housekeeper?

source.original_a: Alice Nelson, played by Ann B Davis
source.notes: Alice Nelson, a series regular.

questions.q: What is the name of the family dog on The Brady Bunch?

source.notes: Tiger — a recurring family dog in early seasons.

questions.q: Which actress plays Carol Brady, the 'lovely lady' matriarch?

source.notes: Henderson became the face of the show.

questions.q: Which middle Brady daughter, jealous of her older sister, famously cries 'Marcia, Marcia, Marcia!'?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: stem rewritten — Jan is the middle daughter (Marcia is oldest); the original phrasing was garbled.

questions.q: Who plays patriarch Mike Brady across the series?

source.notes: Reed publicly clashed with creator Sherwood Schwartz.

questions.q: Who plays Alice the housekeeper across the series?

source.original_a: Alice Nelson, played by Ann B Davis
source.notes: Davis won two Emmys for the role.

questions.q: Who created The Brady Bunch, having previously created Gilligan's Island?

source.notes: Gilligan's Island preceded in the 1960s.

questions.q: Who played Greg, the eldest Brady son?

source.notes: Williams later wrote tell-all memoir 'Growing Up Brady.'

questions.q: Who played Marcia, the eldest Brady daughter?

source.notes: McCormick published memoir 'Here's the Story.'

questions.q: Who played Jan, the middle daughter who famously suffered from 'middle-child syndrome'?

source.notes: Plumb largely stepped back from the franchise later.

questions.q: Which Monkee guest-starred on the episode 'Getting Davy Jones'?

source.notes: Iconic 1971 episode.

questions.q: In a 1972 episode arc, the Brady family takes a much-recapped vacation to which destination?

source.notes: Three-part Hawaii arc opens Season 4.

questions.q: In those Hawaii episodes, which horror-film legend plays the villainous Professor Hubert Whitehead?

source.notes: Price unforgettable as the obsessive archaeologist.

questions.q: Which pro quarterback appeared as himself in the episode 'Mail Order Hero'?

source.notes: Namath was at peak NY Jets fame.

questions.q: Which young cousin, introduced in the final season, is considered the prototype of the 'jumping the shark' TV trope?

source.notes: Robbie Rist's short-lived Oliver.

questions.q: The Brady Bunch's iconic opening sequence uses which production technique?

source.notes: The 3×3 grid with each character looking at each other.

questions.q: The iconic exterior of the Brady house is located in which real Los Angeles neighborhood?

source.notes: Later purchased and renovated for HGTV's 'A Very Brady Renovation.'

questions.q: How many episodes of The Brady Bunch were produced over its original run?

source.notes: Five seasons, 117 episodes.

questions.q: Which group originally recorded the 1969 theme song 'The Brady Bunch'?

source.notes: Later versions used the kid cast.
